parityMeta.describes: iOS-17e-3 progressionRulesEngine parity — no-history baseline. An isolation templateExercise (repMin 12 / repMax 20 / startWeight 10 / sets 3 / conservativeTopSet true) with EMPTY history drives makeSuggestion's first branch: baseline weight=startWeight, reps=repMin, lastSummary '暂无历史', the conservative + isolation(repMax>=20) rangeNote. shouldUseTopBackoff is false (isolation) and buildSetPrescription takes the conservative non-topBackoff '保守版' path. topBackoffProbes pin the kind/sets/startWeight boundary; setPrescriptionProbes pin the adaptiveTopSetFactor<1 / fatigueCost='high' / adaptiveBackoffFactor<0.92 branches of buildSetPrescription. FUNCTION-LEVEL compute-assert on the Swift side.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: deterministicClockIso is anchored in the PAST so the live buildSetWeightFineTune 8-week wall-clock window is always empty (fineTuneNeutrality.fallbackReason='insufficient_history'); the deferred fineTune projection is golden-neutral. Empty history => makeSuggestion first branch. Probe exercises drive shouldUseTopBackoff + buildSetPrescription branches directly.
